title: Control of botrytis cinerea growth on ornamental and vegetable plants
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for controlling filamentous ascomycete growth on plants without causing phytotoxicity to the plants, comprising applying a composition comprising fenpropidin and penconazole to the plants in a fungicidally effective amount. It also relates to a synergistic fungicidal composition comprising fenpropidin and penconazole.
claims: Claims 1. A method for controlling Botrytis cinerea on ornamental or vegetable plants, without causing phytotoxicity to the plants, comprising applying a fungicidally effective amount of a composition comprising fenpropidin and penconazole to the plants or to the locus thereof. 2. A method according to claim 1 , wherein fenpropidin and penconazole are present in the composition in a ratio of from about 1 :10 to about 10:1. 3. A method according to claim 2, wherein fenpropidin and penconazole are present in the composition in a ratio of from about 1 :2 to about 1 :6. 4. A method according to claim 3, wherein fenpropidin and penconazole are present in the composition in a ratio of about 1 :2.6. 5. A method according to claim 1 , wherein fenpropidin is present in the composition in an amount of between about 100mg/L and about 300mg/L. 6. A method according to claim 5, wherein fenpropidin is present in the composition in an amount of about 125mg/L. 7. A method according to claim 1 , wherein penconazole is present in the composition in an amount of about 50mg/L. 8. A method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the ornamental plants are roses. 9. A method according to claim 1 , wherein the composition comprises a further fungicide. 10. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein the composition is applied at a rate of about 1250ml / Ha. 1 1. A synergistic fungicidal composition comprising fenpropidin and penconazole, wherein fenpropidin and penconazole are present in a ratio of about 1 :2.6. 12. A synergistic fungicidal composition according to claim 1 1 , wherein fenpropidin is present in the composition in an amount of about 125mg/L. 13. A synergistic fungicidal composition according to claim 1 1 , wherein penconazole is present in the composition in an amount of about 50mg/L. 14. A synergistic fungicidal composition according to claim 1 1 , wherein the composition comprises a further fungicide. 15. Use of a synergistic fungicidal composition according to any one of claims 1 1 to 14 for the control of Botrytis cinerea on roses.
